subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath revealed unto him who clungeth to the hem of the robe of His mercy, the All-Possessing, the Self-Subsisting. Lo, the light hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن تشبث باذیال ردآء رحمه الله المهیمن القیوم قد سطع النور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual transformation
